title: CCL - Selecting No Noise Block
scenario: Verify "No Noise Block" option is selectable in Device Settings > Advanced on CCL-supported devices
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Scroll down and tap on 'Advanced' under Device Settings.
Locate the 'No Noise Block' option in the Advanced settings.
Tap on the 'No Noise Block' option to select it.
expected: The 'No Noise Block' option is successfully selected and applied on devices that support CCL (Customizable Calibration Level).
